subcodes.title: Words to Alma Albertson et al, spoken on 1900-11-23
subcodes.first_line: In any sort of business, both spiritual and material, the success thereof depends upon the capacity of those attending to it.
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @differences in human capacity, @education and the development of capacity, @spiritual transformation, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @knowledge; recognition of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
